title: agalinis besseyana
intro: Agalinis besseyana, also known as prairie balm, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Agalinis besseyana is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
